title: actaea rubra
intro: Actaea rubra, also known as black cohosh, is a perennial plant native to eastern North America, belonging to the buttercup family. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and estrogenic effects. The health benefits of black cohosh include alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats, as well as reducing anxiety and promoting better sleep. Black cohosh is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal preparations to enhance its effectiveness.
